positive: A stylish, minimal abstract composition featuring a central, stylized mountain range rendered in interlocking geometric forms. The palette should be deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream. The mountain forms should evoke a sense of modern spirituality and rugged tranquility. Use strong silhouette contrast against a pale, textured sky background. The design must be perfectly contained for apparel printing, featuring clean lines, no gradients, and excellent visibility on fabric. High contrast, graphic vector art style, flat lay, symmetrical composition, suitable for a high-end streetwear brand print.
negative: blur, fuzzy, noisy, text, logo, signature, watermark, writing, bad anatomy, distorted, artifacts, low detail, cropped, gradient, realism, photorealistic
